summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Mirai Design landing page. All requested features verified working correctly: 3-card pricing structure (Start, Standard, Pro), no blur effects, no buyout prices, 'Flexible subscription' text, currency switcher (PLN/EUR/CNY/JPY), language switcher with all 6 languages (en/pl/de/fr/zh/ja), and navigation between pages.

issues: External preview URL (https://mirai-design.preview.emergentagent.com) returns 'Web server returned an unknown error'. This is a Kubernetes ingress configuration issue, not a code issue. Frontend works correctly on localhost:3000.

action_items: External preview URL not working - may need Kubernetes ingress configuration check (outside app scope)
updated_files: /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf - Changed 'yarn start' to 'yarn dev' for Vite
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is a Vite + React 18 app with i18n (6 languages). All features working correctly on localhost:3000. External preview URL has ingress issues but app code is correct. Supervisor config was fixed to use 'yarn dev' instead of 'yarn start'.

pricing_page_3_cards.details: Start, Standard, Pro plans displayed in 3-column grid layout

no_buyout_prices.details: No buyout text found on pricing cards

currency_switcher.details: PLN, EUR, CNY, JPY all working correctly with proper formatting

hero_no_blur.details: No blur elements found, using gradient circles instead

language_switcher.details: All 6 languages working: English, Polski, Deutsch, Français, 中文, 日本語

pro_plan_translations.details: Pro plan correctly translated in all 6 languages

navigation.details: All pages accessible: Home, Work, Pricing, Process, About, Contact
